data.description: Choose one creature within range, choose creatures within that range are two or will within feet each A must 5 of other. target succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or lake Id6 acid damage. This damage increases by Id6 when you reach spell's 5th (2d6), leveI and leveI

You touch one willing creature. For the duration, the target's hit point maximum increases by 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier (this increase doesn't stack). The increase lasts for 1 hour or until you cast this spell again on a different target.

Choose up to three creatures within range. Each target's hit point maximum and current points increase by 5 for the duration. At Higher Levels, when cast using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, this increases the targets' hit points by an additional 5 for each slot level above 2nd.
